Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class UIObjectRelationConfig

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.UIObjectRelationConfig
public class UIObjectRelationConfig extends Metadata

Java class for UIObjectRelationConfig complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="UIObjectRelationConfig">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="UIObjectRelationFieldConfigs" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}UIObjectRelationFieldConfig" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="contextObject" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="contextObjectRecordType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="directRelationshipField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="indirectObjectContextField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="indirectObjectRelatedField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="indirectRelationshipObject" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isActive" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="masterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="relatedObject" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="relatedObjectRecordType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="relationshipType" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ObjectRelationshipType"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

  • Method Details

    • getUIObjectRelationFieldConfigs

      public List<UIObjectRelationFieldConfig> getUIObjectRelationFieldConfigs()
      Gets the value of the uiObjectRelationFieldConfigs property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the uiObjectRelationFieldConfigs property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getUIObjectRelationFieldConfigs().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list UIObjectRelationFieldConfig

      Returns:
      The value of the uiObjectRelationFieldConfigs property.
